title: Annotation toolbar component with editor integration
purpose: Provides a toolbar for adding and clearing annotations in a CodeMirror editor, supporting comment, propose, approve, reject, and clear actions.
module_context: Exports AnnotationToolbar component and helper functions insertAnnotation and clearAnnotations for managing document annotations in CodeMirror editor views.

methods.name: insertAnnotation
methods.normalized_params: (view: EditorView, type: AnnotationType, reason?: string): void

steps.content: Validate that the editor view is provided.
Determine if there is an active text selection.
IF there is a selection, wrap the selected text with appropriate annotation markers.
ELSE insert a block marker at the cursor position.
Dispatch the changes to the editor view with the new annotation text.
Validate that the editor view is provided.
Determine the text range to process (selection or current line).
Fetch the text content from the determined range.
Remove all annotation patterns from the text using regular expressions.
Collapse multiple consecutive newlines into double newlines.
Dispatch the cleaned text back to the editor view.
IF the editor view is available, insert a comment annotation at the current cursor position.
IF the editor view is available, insert a propose annotation at the current cursor position.
IF the editor view is available, insert an approve annotation at the current cursor position.
Prompt the user for a rejection reason.
IF a reason is provided and the editor view is available, insert a reject annotation with the reason.
IF the editor view is available, clear all annotations from the current selection or line.
